summary: Frontend-only verification of the NullaiZeroMark SVG logomark swap in hero + footer, plus favicon.svg wiring. All acceptance criteria pass after restarting the frontend dev server so the updated index.html (with <link rel=icon type=image/svg+xml href=/favicon.svg>) was re-served.
verified: hero-logomark is now an <svg> element (tag=svg), with role='img', aria-label='NULLAI', and <title>NULLAI</title>. Rendered size 224x359 px, visually confirmed as tall-ellipse ring logomark with slight diagonal weight shift.
Exactly 2 instances of NullaiZeroMark are present on the page (hero + footer) and their mask ids are unique (nullai-zero-mask-_r_0_, nullai-zero-mask-_r_1_) -> no id collision.
Footer brand area shows the SVG `0` mark before 'NULLAI · v2.0' text (verified via DOM + screenshot). FooterBrand passes decorative=true so the inner <title> is omitted, which is correct.

Regression text content preserved: hero-title 'The Autonomous Scarcity Organism', hero-status-pill 'LIVE ON BASE MAINNET', hero-cta-primary 'Launchpad Incoming // SOON', hero-cta-manifesto 'Read the Manifesto', footer-disclaimer 'NULLAI is a live synthetic experiment on Base Mainnet. No human promises. Only code.'
Tokenomics live grid (data-testid=tokenomics-live-grid) renders; Vortex Event Ticker heading and stream card render correctly (screenshot-verified). No console errors/warnings.
<link rel='icon' type='image/svg+xml' href='/favicon.svg'> is present in <head> after frontend restart; GET /favicon.svg returns 200.
0 console errors, 0 console warnings, 0 page errors on initial load.
action_items: No code fixes required. NOTE for main agent: the favicon <link> tag only started showing up after `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` — CRA dev server had cached the pre-change index.html. No action needed beyond awareness (hot reload does not re-inject changes to public/index.html).
critical_code_review_comments: NullaiZeroMark.jsx correctly uses React.useId() and strips ':' to generate a SVG-id-safe unique mask id — prevents collisions across multiple instances. Clean.
FooterBrand correctly passes `decorative` so the SVG is aria-hidden and no duplicate 'NULLAI' is announced by screen readers alongside the 'NULLAI · v2.0' span.
favicon.svg is a standalone static asset that mirrors the React component's geometry — could be DRY'd by having NullaiZeroMark export a string template used to generate both, but acceptable for now.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NullaiZeroMark component + favicon swap fully verified. If E1 changes public/index.html in the future, remember to restart frontend supervisor — CRA dev server caches index.html at start and hot reload does not pick up changes to it.
rca of the issue: Initial run showed favicon <link> tag missing in rendered HTML even though /app/frontend/public/index.html contained it. Root cause: CRA's webpack-dev-server caches public/index.html at boot and does not hot-reload changes to it. Mitigation: `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` — after restart, the raw HTML included the <link rel='icon' type='image/svg+xml' href='/favicon.svg'> tag and the DOM query for the link element succeeded.
